name: Degenbrecher (Arknights)
description: Degenbrecher, a former three-time champion of the Kazimierz Major, is now a formidable operator at Rhodes Island and the personal bodyguard to Enciodes SilverAsh, president of Karlan Trade. Renowned for her unmatched battle prowess and inability to use Originium Arts, she defies conventional expectations. Her past is marked by defiance against the General Chamber of Commerce's manipulations, leading to her escape to Kjerag. There, she leads a simpler life, helping villagers and engaging in local traditions. Driven by curiosity rather than personal aspirations, Degenbrecher remains an enigmatic and resilient figure whose journey continues to captivate.
creator: Skadi'sHusband648
